title: Website - Planning session
summary: Kristina Cvitko confirmed the newsletter process, with Michael Donovan outlining a new low-friction distribution. Michael Donovan proposed a website redesign due to deprecated technology and disorganization, suggesting a "fresh start" and leading the setup in a new staging environment. Kristina Cvitko agreed to dedicate time to collaborate on the WordPress overhaul, focusing on foundational design elements. The plan includes migrating content via Docker and aiming for a 90+ performance score.

decisions.description: Kristina will dedicate time from monthly pages to assist with WordPress site overhaul.
Implement a new low-friction newsletter distribution process.
Website redesign will be a "fresh start" with only necessary plugins and extensions.
Create a new staging environment for the website redesign.
Install a new, reputable theme for the redesigned website.
Migrate existing content using a local Docker instance with a "Claude plugin".
Aim for a website performance score of 90 plus.
Kristina Cvitko will focus on foundational design elements like design tokens in staging.
Michael Donovan will create a phased plan for the website project.
Vin will be looped in on the website redesign plan.

actionItems.task: Set up Slack automation for first contributor content request.

expectedOutcome.description: Automated content requests sent to newsletter contributors.

actionItems.task: Share January newsletter dates with Kristina Cvitko for feedback.

expectedOutcome.description: Kristina reviews and provides feedback on newsletter timeline.

actionItems.task: Dedicate time from monthly pages to assist with new WordPress site build and plugins.

expectedOutcome.description: Progress made on new website build and plugin management.

actionItems.task: Create new WP Engine instance, apply new theme, and use Docker for content migration.

expectedOutcome.description: New website instance with migrated content and new theme.

actionItems.task: Put together and lay out phases for tackling website redesign and fixing the new site.

expectedOutcome.description: Phased plan for website redesign project.

actionItems.task: Loop Vin in on the website redesign plan.

expectedOutcome.description: Vin is informed and aligned with the website plan.

actionItems.task: Research where to interject in the phases for tackling the website redesign.

expectedOutcome.description: Kristina identifies optimal points for her contribution to the website project.

actionItems.task: Send the Lighthouse report to Kristina Cvitko.

expectedOutcome.description: Kristina receives current website performance metrics.

tensions: Michael Donovan's frustration with Z's poor performance and eventual firing.

contributions.description: Confirmed newsletter process is similar to before, following Natalie's ideas.
Mentioned Joe wants to add a financial part, possibly a 2025 recap.
Noted external email is now shorter, with only a button to the Pablo link.
Outlined a new, low-friction newsletter distribution process.
Detailed need for website redesign due to deprecated technology and disorganization.
Proposed a "fresh start" for the WordPress site, installing only necessary plugins.
Suggested taking the lead on new site setup in staging, then handing off or collaborating.
Agreed to dedicate time from monthly pages to assist with WordPress site overhaul.
Explained plan for new staging environment, reputable theme, and content migration via Docker.
